workflow.name: Set Up a Third-Person Character
workflow.description: Create a playable third-person character with skeletal mesh, camera boom, input bindings, and basic movement using the Character Movement Component.
prerequisites: An open UE project with a level

steps.purpose: Use the character creation workflow to set up the base character Blueprint
Add a SpringArmComponent (camera boom) for third-person view
Add a CameraComponent attached to the spring arm
Set spring arm length, rotation lag, and camera settings
Add Move input action for WASD movement
Add Look input action for mouse camera control
Set the GameMode default pawn to this character
Compile to verify the character setup

workflow.expectedOutcome: A playable third-person character with camera boom, input bindings, and basic movement ready for gameplay testing
